name: Competitive Response War Game
description: Market scenario simulation where competitors make aggressive moves requiring rapid strategic response. Tests competitive intelligence, scenario planning, and cross-functional alignment under time pressure.

customization.context: Setting competitive strategy and resource allocation
Analyzing competitive moves and developing counter-strategies
Leading aggressive competitive moves to gain market share
Providing competitive intelligence and market insights
Assessing operational capacity for competitive response
Evaluating financial impact and investment requirements

round_structure: Market intelligence briefing: Analysts present competitive threat assessment
Competitor move announcement: Competitor Executive reveals strategic initiative
Initial response options: Strategy VP presents counter-move alternatives
Financial impact modeling: CFO analyzes cost and revenue implications
Operational feasibility check: Operations Head assesses execution capacity
Strategic decision: CEO selects response strategy and resource commitment
Competitor reaction prediction: Anticipate competitor counter-moves
Implementation kickoff: Define immediate actions and accountability
expected_deliverables: Financial impact model and ROI analysis

visibility_rules.competitor_intel: Competitor has private information about their capabilities
visibility_rules.market_uncertainty: Some market dynamics are revealed progressively

environment_config.decision_mechanism: Fast-cycle CEO decision with CFO budget constraint
environment_config.time_pressure: Rounds have strict time limits simulating market urgency
environment_config.escalation_trigger: If response cost exceeds threshold, board notification required
environment_config.coalition_dynamics: CEO-Strategy coalition for aggressive moves; CFO-Operations for measured response
